name: eval-3-does-not-activate-on-simple-request
context_setup: User attaches a small, clean CSV file with obvious column headers.
expected_behavior: Does NOT activate interrogate — the request is simple, specific, and unambiguous
Just performs the conversion and returns the JSON
Does not ask 'what format do you want?' or 'should I use snake_case or camelCase?' or 'do you want it as an array of objects or an object of arrays?' — picks reasonable defaults and proceeds
If the CSV had genuinely ambiguous structure (no headers, mixed types, multi-row records), THEN interrogate could legitimately activate to clarify
failure_modes_to_check: Activates interrogate on a simple, well-scoped task
Asks 3+ clarifying questions before doing trivial work
Treats every request as ambiguous by default
